scripts.agent-run-lens: node -e "const args = process.argv.slice(1); if (args[0] === '--') args.shift(); if (process.env.INIT_CWD) process.chdir(process.env.INIT_CWD); import('./dist/main.js').then((m) => m.main(args)).catch((error) => { console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)); process.exitCode = 1; })"
